title: Quietly Quantum
description: A early Alpha cartoony resource pack for 1.20.X
body:
Status : On halt. 
Working on other projects, just not really interested in continuing this at the moment. 

Quietly Quantum is a cartoon styled Minecraft pack.

This pack is around 25% done, expect many missing things, this is still in very active development. So expect textures to also maybe just be bugged.

Quietly Quantum is a resource pack based off of my 3 year old resource pack on PlanetMinecraft, which Is 

1: Lost media now, I have zero updated backups

And 2: I highly disliked the style of it, and the way I did things.

So I decided after 3 years to finally give this pack a deserving remaster.

Supporting me monthly on Ko-fi gives you early access to builds.
(Please read the tiers to see what would fit you best.)
